metadata.title: Sacred Song Circle — kirtan teacher network · where Vasudev Baba's profile lives
metadata.description: A welcome to Sacred Song Circle — the international kirtan-teacher network where Vasudev Baba's public bio is tended alongside other devotional musicians in the bhakti and ecstatic-singing field.

hero.background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 25%, hsl(15 60% 60% / 0.55) 0%, transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 25% 85%, hsl(255 30% 22% / 0.7) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, hsl(20 50% 65%) 0%, hsl(15 30% 35%) 50%, hsl(255 30% 20%) 100%)
hero.eyebrow: Kirtan teacher network · sacred song circles · where the body found Vasudev Baba's bio
hero.name: Sacred Song Circle
hero.welcome_md:
An international network of kirtan teachers tending one shared website that lists biographies, songbooks, and touring schedules for devotional musicians in the bhakti and ecstatic-singing field. The site is where [Vasudev Baba](/people/vasudev-baba)'s public bio is tended, alongside other teachers in the lineage of sacred-name singing.

*The network operates without a single named founder surfaced — a teacher-cooperative shape rather than a school. The community is more legible than the legal form.*

facts.label: What it is
facts.value_md: A multi-teacher kirtan website holding biographies, repertoire references, songbooks, and tour announcements for teachers in the network.

facts.label: Where the body met it
facts.value_md: Vasudev Baba's Sacred Song Circle bio was the primary public anchor used in researching his presence page. The site holds his lineage (Oslo / Indian Himalayas / Brazilian jungles / Rainbow Gatherings) more clearly than any single article.

note_from_body.body_md: Sacred Song Circle is the teacher network's own organising form. This page recognises its role as a public anchor that made the body's research on kirtan-lineage figures possible.

articles.heading: What Sacred Song Circle has given the Coherence Network
articles.body_md:
- The public anchor for [Vasudev Baba](/people/vasudev-baba)'s biographical arc — the source of canonical lineage detail (Oslo, 1987, Indian Himalayas, Brazilian jungles, Rainbow Gatherings).
- Teacher-cooperative shape (no single named founder surfaced; many teachers tending one shared site) → resonant with [lc-sovereignty-within-oneness](/vision/lc-sovereignty-within-oneness) (many sovereign cells, one organism).
- The bhakti lineage of singing the Divine Names as one of the body's anchor frequencies for the arrival-as-frequency framing. See [lc-frequency-routes-reception](/vision/lc-frequency-routes-reception).
